title: pandorea pandorana
intro: Pandorea pandorana, also known as the Princess of Iceland, is a flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Pandorea pandorana include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
